strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React-ecosystem experience across multiple senior roles, directly matching the core stack
Founder of GISCollective, an event-driven platform deployable on Kubernetes — demonstrates fullstack ownership end-to-end
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP/LLM tooling, aligning with the nice-to-have LLM integration skills
concerns: Resume shows senior/staff-level seniority while the role targets entry to mid-level — potential level mismatch
Database experience leans MongoDB; PostgreSQL/relational depth not explicitly highlighted
High on-site presence required, but candidate is listed in San Francisco with Berlin work history
response.justification: The candidate brings a rare combination of pragmatic fullstack TypeScript/Node/React expertise, hands-on Kubernetes and Docker deployments via GISCollective, and current AI-agent/LLM infrastructure work at re:cinq — covering both the core requirements and the platform's nice-to-haves. A documented commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching workshops) signals strong alignment with the role's emphasis on clean architecture, learning ability, and team collaboration, making this a high-upside hire who can contribute from day one and mentor as the team grows.
